title: Premier Housewares Wall Clock with Red Hands - Black
features: Contrasting the black face are white numbers to represent the hours and red hands that will allow you clearly to read the time
Made using durable and reliable MDF, the clock will stand the test of time
Care instructions: Dust with a dry cloth
Height 58 cm x width 58 cm x depth 5 cm
description: Product Description Premier Housewares offers a wide, varied selection of home accessories at competitive prices. Our products are unique, statement pieces that will bring character, glamour and style into your home. Premier Housewares are one of the UK's leading suppliers and distributors of housewares and home lifestyle products to the retail trade. With an extensive portfolio that covers kitchenware, tabletop and bathroom accessories, as well as soft furnishing, decorative accessories, lighting and occasional furniture, our aim is to provide a complete solution to your housewares retailing needs by offering a comprehensive collection of co-ordinating products. Box Contains 1 x Premier Housewares Black Wall Clock with Red Hands
